## Does this preserve project boundaries?

- [ ] Does not provide buy/sell/hold recommendations.
- [ ] Does not suggest purchases, investments, trades, position sizing, price targets, or expected returns.
- [ ] Does not require paid APIs.
- [ ] Does not require external services.
- [ ] Does not require credentials, brokerage, wallet, email, or private account access.
- [ ] Preserves `Crowd Signal Quality ≠ Security Risk ≠ Trade Decision`.
- [ ] Preserves `Crowd Signal Playbook ≠ Investment Playbook`.
